channel.title: Events on Bell Badminton Club
channel.description: Recent content in Events on Bell Badminton Club

item.title: 2025 Christmas Party
item.author: test@example.com (Web Author)
item.description: Thanks to all of the club members who came out for the 2025 Christmas party. We had a fun evening filled with great food, prizes, and of course, Badminton! Special thanks to Cindy for organizing all of the gifts!
